# nFamily Wiki

Welcome to the nFamily wiki.

**Status:** Scaffolding only. Full v1.0.0 implementation roadmap is in the nSelf ecosystem planning docs.

## Quick links

- [README](../../README.md) — overview, install, license
- [nSelf ecosystem docs](https://nself.org/docs) — backend setup, plugin configuration, CLI reference
- [nFamily plugin bundle](https://nself.org/pricing) — pricing and plugin list

## What is nFamily?

nFamily is a private alternative to Ancestry.com and Geni.com combined with a photo-sharing layer for living family members. You own the data and the hardware.

Backed by the **nFamily plugin bundle** (`$0.99/mo` or via [ɳSelf+](https://nself.org/pricing)):
- `family` — genealogy core, GEDCOM 5.5.1-compatible
- `family-geni` — Geni.com importer (OAuth + photos)
- `social` — posts, comments, reactions
- `photos` — album management, EXIF, thumbnails
- `activity-feed` — fan-out feeds
- `moderation` — shared with nChat
- `realtime` — live updates (shared with nChat)
- `cms` — headless content management
- `chat` — family messaging (shared with nChat)

## Development

See nSelf planning docs for the full implementation roadmap (phases P-FAM-4 and P-FAM-5).
